title: Photobiomodulation for genitourinary syndrome of menopause
author: Pei-Chi Wu

steps.instruction: Manufacturer / Model: Transverse Industries Co., Ltd, Taiwan — TI-816-12 Emitter type: AlGaInP semiconductor diode laser Number of emitters: Single Spatial distribution of emitters: Single emitter at probe center Beam delivery system: Silicone light guide vaginal probe

Center wavelength: 660 nm Spectral bandwidth: ±10nm Operating mode: Pulsed Frequency: 20 Hz Pulse on duration: 0.025 sec Duty cycle: 50% Energy per pulse: 0.0184 J Polarization: Linear Aperture diameter: 1.2 cm Irradiance at aperture: 646.99 mW/cm² Beam divergence: ≈0.35 mrad Beam shape: Circular Beam profile: Uniform

steps.instruction: Peak radiant power: 737.57 mW Average radiant power: 368.79 mW Beam spot size at target: 2 cm² Irradiance at target: Tip of probe: 32.38 mW/cm², Side of probe: 13.38 mW/cm² Exposure duration: 1800 sec (30 min per session) Radiant exposure (Fluence): Vaginal fornix: 29.14 J/cm², Vaginal wall: 12.04 J/cm² Radiant energy (per session): 178.7 J Number of points irradiated: Whole vaginal mucosa Area irradiated: 12cm² Application technique: Contact Number of sessions: 8 sessions Total radiant energy: 1429.6 J
